requirement_topic.en: NEPCO and Distribution-Utility Grid Connection Review
requirement_topic.zh: NEPCO及配电公用事业并网审查
requirement_topic.zht: NEPCO及配電公用事業併網審查

summary.en: Jordan's electricity system is coordinated through NEPCO and regulated electricity-sector participants, with distribution utilities and site owners controlling practical connection studies for chargers. High-power AC or DC EVSE may need capacity review, transformer and feeder checks, protection coordination, metering design, load-management logic, harmonic and flicker assessment, and commissioning acceptance before energization.
summary.zh: 约旦电力系统由NEPCO及受监管电力部门参与方协调，充电桩实际接入研究由配电公用事业和场站业主控制。大功率交流或直流EVSE在送电前可能需要容量审查、变压器和馈线核查、保护配合、计量设计、负荷管理逻辑、谐波和闪变评估以及调试验收。
summary.zht: 約旦電力系統由NEPCO及受監管電力部門參與方協調，充電樁實際接入研究由配電公用事業和場站業主控制。大功率交流或直流EVSE在送電前可能需要容量審查、變壓器和饋線核查、保護配合、計量設計、負荷管理邏輯、諧波和閃變評估以及調試驗收。

standards_or_laws: NEPCO electricity-system role and public grid information
Distribution utility connection conditions applicable to the site
Jordan electricity-sector regulation and metering requirements

summary.en: China projects commonly prepare utility capacity-application files, transformer sizing, low-voltage or medium-voltage connection drawings, harmonic calculations, and GB/T charger specifications. These are useful engineering inputs but must be recalculated for Jordan's utility, feeder, tariff, metering, and protection requirements.
summary.zh: 中国项目通常准备公用事业容量申请资料、变压器选型、低压或中压接入图、谐波计算和GB/T充电桩规格。这些是有用的工程输入，但必须按约旦公用事业、馈线、电价、计量和保护要求重新计算。
summary.zht: 中國項目通常準備公用事業容量申請資料、變壓器選型、低壓或中壓接入圖、諧波計算和GB/T充電樁規格。這些是有用的工程輸入，但必須按約旦公用事業、饋線、電價、計量和保護要求重新計算。

standards_or_laws: China utility connection practice for EV charging sites
GB/T 18487 power quality and charger documentation
Project-specific low-voltage or medium-voltage design documents

gap.en: The grid gap is site-specific. Exporters should provide accurate charger demand profiles, maximum simultaneous load, power factor, harmonic-current data, inrush behavior, protective device settings, communication for load management, and commissioning test procedures so the Jordan applicant can complete distribution-company and EMRC review.
gap.zh: 电网差距具有场站属性。出口商应提供准确的充电桩负荷曲线、最大同时负荷、功率因数、谐波电流数据、涌流行为、保护装置整定、负荷管理通信和调试测试程序，以便约旦申请方完成配电公司和EMRC审查。
gap.zht: 電網差距具有場站屬性。出口商應提供準確的充電樁負荷曲線、最大同時負荷、功率因數、諧波電流數據、湧流行為、保護裝置整定、負荷管理通訊和調試測試程序，以便約旦申請方完成配電公司和EMRC審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory before energization where utility connection approval, metering, or electricity-sector licence conditions apply
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-connection studies are engineering references and do not approve a Jordan site

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat NEPCO and distribution-utility connection review as a site engineering workstream. Product certificates alone do not authorize energizing a high-power charger in Jordan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将NEPCO及配电公用事业接入审查视为场站工程工作流。产品证书本身不授权约旦大功率充电桩送电。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將NEPCO及配電公用事業接入審查視為場站工程工作流。產品證書本身不授權約旦大功率充電樁送電。
